title: OfferLink Chrome Extension - Phoenix Date Picker Architecture
summary: Complete knowledge of the Phoenix date picker implementation in the OfferLink Chrome extension. Covers two calendar modes: month-only (phoenix-calendar-month-calendar) and full-date (phoenix-calendar-date-panel). Documents the original source code flow (ln() → x()/k() with N()→I()→C()→P() chain), all 9 phoenix-calendar-* CSS selectors, month name alias table from findMonthName(), multiple picker coexistence handling, and the separate month-calendar navigation using prev/next-year-btn. Traced from module_1479.js original source.
